docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $750.00 FILED BY MANSOUR, HEBA AS TO DEFENDANT FUNG, WILLIAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-15-2011 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF MANSOUR, HEBA
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MANSOUR, HEBA AS TO DEFENDANT FUNG, WILLIAM
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-02-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FUNG, WILLIAM
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-15-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-15-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-15-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MANSOUR, HEBA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FUNG, WILLIAM $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $795.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT FUNG, WILLIAM
